findings.summary: Visible i launcher does not reliably show the full Inspector.
findings.code_finding: openWidget can mount/focus but WidgetFrame keeps minimized state privately, so launcher cannot restore expansion.

findings.summary: Void shows an unexplained additional inner circle.
findings.code_finding: inner echo is hard-coded at 0.42 outer radius and 0.68 outer-edge opacity without a user setting.

findings.summary: Membrane colour cannot produce a true solid field while retaining the current Cell-derived gradient option.
findings.code_finding: shader applies 0.88 spatial Cell-colour dominance whenever Cell weights exist.

required_resolution.void: standard Void has no inner echo; optional future Inner Echo default OFF
required_resolution.membrane_colour: Cell Gradient default plus Solid Black, Ink, MOOORF Red, Charcoal and Custom
required_resolution.m2_softness: separate Field Edge Softness and independent Membrane Edge Softness
